claims.claim: The Bank of Israel new-series-database (Fusion Edge Server) serves data over SDMX 2.1 REST at https://edge.boi.gov.il/FusionEdgeServer/ws/public/sdmxapi/rest/data/{DATAFLOW}/{series} . The older sdmx/v2/data/dataflow/BOI/... path returns 404. Requests need a normal browser User-Agent and use startPeriod/endPeriod; observations come back as <Obs TIME_PERIOD OBS_VALUE> elements. The structure/metadata path is https://edge.boi.gov.il/FusionEdgeServer/sdmx/v2/structure/dataflow/BOI.STATISTICS .
claims.raw_snippet: Representative exchange rates are extracted from the new series database via the Fusion Edge Server SDMX REST API (ws/public/sdmxapi/rest/data), e.g. data/EXR/RER_USD_ILS.

claims.claim: Representative exchange rates (sha'ar yatzig) are per-currency series named RER_<CUR>_ILS (e.g. RER_USD_ILS, RER_EUR_ILS, RER_GBP_ILS, RER_JPY_ILS per 100 JPY, RER_CHF_ILS) inside the EXR dataflow. DATA_TYPE OF00 marks the official representative rate. Verified live: USD/ILS was about 2.81 (1 Jun 2026) to 2.91 (5 Jun 2026).

Bank of Israel interest-rate data is in the BIR dataflow; CPI / price indices are in the PRI dataflow. Both are reachable via the same REST data path. The headline policy rate is most reliably read from the Monetary Committee decision (boi.org.il monetary-policy / press releases). The committee announces rate decisions about 6 times per year.
claims.raw_snippet: The Bank of Israel Monetary Committee sets the interest rate and announces decisions on scheduled dates (about six times a year); rate and price-index series are published in the new series database (BIR, PRI dataflows).

claims.claim: Approximate CBS Consumer Price Index basket weights: housing (rent component) ~25%, food ~17%, transportation ~17%, education and culture ~11%, health ~6%, clothing ~3%. These are approximate and the CBS reweights the basket periodically.
claims.raw_snippet: The CBS Consumer Price Index is built from weighted expenditure groups (housing, food, transport, education and culture, health, clothing, etc.) with weights updated periodically; housing carries roughly a quarter of the basket.

claims.claim: The BOI representative exchange rate is published once per business day at approximately 15:30 Israel time (business days Sunday-Thursday; no Friday/Saturday publication). CBS publishes CPI around the 15th of the following month. The BOI inflation target is 1-3%.
claims.raw_snippet: The representative rate is determined and published each business day in the afternoon (around 15:30); it is not published on Fridays, Saturdays or holidays. The Bank's inflation target range is 1% to 3%.

claims.claim: Reference and data-source URLs cited in the skill.
claims.raw_snippet: URLs: https://www.boi.org.il/en/economic-roles/statistical-information/ https://www.boi.org.il/en/communication-and-publications/press-releases/ https://www.boi.org.il/en/economic-roles/monetary-policy/ https://www.boi.org.il/he/economic-roles/statistical-information/ https://www.boi.org.il/he/communication-and-publications/press-releases/ https://www.cbs.gov.il/en/subjects/Pages/Consumer-Price-Index.aspx https://www.cbs.gov.il/he/subjects/Pages/מדד-המחירים-לצרכן.aspx https://www.cbs.gov.il/he/pages/default.aspx https://info.tase.co.il/ https://data.gov.il/ http://www.sdmx.org/resources/sdmxml/schemas/v2_1/message http://www.sdmx.org/resources/sdmxml/schemas/v2_1/data/generic https://edge.boi.gov.il/FusionEdgeServer/sdmx/v2/structure/dataflow/BOI.STATISTICS https://edge.boi.gov.il/FusionEdgeServer/ws/public/sdmxapi/rest/data/ https://edge.boi.gov.il/FusionEdgeServer/ws/public/sdmxapi/rest/data/{DATAFLOW}/{series} https://edge.boi.gov.il/FusionEdgeServer/ws/public/sdmxapi/rest/data/EXR/RER_USD_ILS https://edge.boi.gov.il/FusionEdgeServer/ws/public/sdmxapi/rest/data/EXR/RER_USD_ILS?startPeriod={date}&endPeriod={date} https://edge.boi.gov.il/FusionEdgeServer/ws/public/sdmxapi/rest/data/BIR/?startPeriod={date}&endPeriod={date} https://edge.boi.gov.il/FusionEdgeServer/ws/public/sdmxapi/rest/data/BIR/?startPeriod=2026-01-01&endPeriod=2026-12-31 https://edge.boi.gov.il/FusionEdgeServer/ws/public/sdmxapi/rest/data/PRI/?startPeriod=2026-01&endPeriod=2026-05 . Currency display tokens: '1 NIS', '1 USD = X NIS', ', שקל'.
